name: team-project-memory
description: Shared project memory and team knowledge graph for developer teams, AI coding agents, and multi-agent swarms

interface.shortDescription: Shared project memory for dev teams, agents, and swarms
interface.longDescription: Skill-first, git-backed project memory and team knowledge graph for developer teams using AI coding agents or multi-agent swarms. Captures solved bugs, failed attempts, debugging paths, confidence, and next-reuse instructions without overriding repo-local instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use Team Project Memory to capture solved bugs and reusable team learnings.
Share prior debugging paths across developer teams, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Devin, Cline, and multi-agent swarms.
